df27c86b4dc0.title: Publish opening hours — you're invisible to 'open now' searches
df27c86b4dc0.description: No opening hours listed. Every customer filtering by 'open now' on Google Maps will never see you. This takes 2 minutes to fix.
df27c86b4dc0.management_implication: This is a zero-effort, high-impact fix.

9a7fb6632f60.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
9a7fb6632f60.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
9a7fb6632f60.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

f524f6aba894.title: Identify and fix the recurring guest complaint
f524f6aba894.description: At 3.9/5 on Google, something specific is landing badly. Read the 5 most recent negative reviews, identify the common thread, and fix it at source. The rating won't move until the root cause does.
f524f6aba894.management_implication: Below 4.0, Google actively suppresses your venue in search results.

7be197931f08.title: Close the hygiene gap — 1 to 5
7be197931f08.description: An FSA rating of 1 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
7be197931f08.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

be992822fcf7.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
be992822fcf7.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

a0ed582cf652.title: Ranked #18 of 18 locally — peers are ahead
a0ed582cf652.description: At percentile 0.0, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

206838bd0f9e.title: Guest experience trailing — investigate what peers do differently
206838bd0f9e.description: You trail peers by 2.9 points on experience. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

b323736b4f70.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
b323736b4f70.description: You trail peers by 5.1 points on trust. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.
